project.component: { "keyToString": { "Docker.Dockerfile.executor": "Run", "Docker.docker-compose.yml.db: Compose Deployment.executor": "Run", "Docker.docker-compose.yml.kafka: Compose Deployment.executor": "Run", "Docker.docker-compose.yml.zookeeper: Compose Deployment.executor": "Run", "Docker.docker-compose.yml: Compose Deployment.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Build HyperBrain-be.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Build HyperBrainV2.executor": "Run", "Gradle.CrossSystemSyncIntegrationTest.shouldCreateMappingWhenAppleReminderArrives.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.Download Sources.executor": "Run", "Gradle.HyperBrain-be [:app:bootRun].executor": "Run", "Gradle.HyperBrain-be [bootRun].executor": "Debug", "Gradle.HyperBrain-be [bootTestRun].executor": "Run", "Gradle.HyperBrain-be [build].executor": "Run", "Gradle.HyperBrain-be [test].executor": "Run", "Gradle.HyperBrainV2 [build].executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "Spring Boot.SopfcApplication (1).executor": "Run", "Spring Boot.SopfcApplication (2).executor": "Run", "Spring Boot.SopfcApplication (3).executor": "Run", "Spring Boot.SopfcApplication.executor": "Run", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "/Users/danielc/Documents/Code/HyperBrain/HyperBrain-be", "project.structure.last.edited": "Modules", "project.structure.proportion": "0.0", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.2", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "Docker" } }
